prompt: Translate this English proverb into two other languages in a way that preserves the spirit, not the words: 'The best time to plant a tree was twenty years ago. The second best time is now.' Add a one-sentence note on each.
response:
Spanish: "El mejor momento para plantar una arboleda fue hace veinte años. El segundo mejor momento es ahora." (Note: This proverb emphasizes the importance of acting now, even if it's late, to achieve long-term goals.)

French: "Le meilleur moment pour planter un arbre était il y a vingt ans. Le second meilleur moment est maintenant." (Note: This proverb encourages individuals to seize the moment and take action, regardless of when they realize its importance.)
